filter_notes: R7 rejected: metric contract is fixed by evaluation contract and comparability contract.
R8 deferred: useful but can be built in parallel; not the first falsifiable hypothesis.
R5 deferred: symbolic regression risks black-box terms; keep as fallback if pure analytical terms fail.
R6 folded into R4 as validation instrumentation.

raw_ideas.summary: Add tile-size-dependent occupancy correction to the FA4 roofline.
raw_ideas.title: Occupancy correction

raw_ideas.summary: Add effective HBM/L2/TMA bandwidth model with transfer-size efficiency.
raw_ideas.title: Effective bandwidth model

raw_ideas.summary: Add precision-specific Tensor Core MMA throughput and exponential emulation terms.
raw_ideas.title: Precision throughput correction

raw_ideas.summary: Combine occupancy, TMA/L2, and precision corrections into one analytical predictor.
raw_ideas.title: Combined analytical predictor

raw_ideas.summary: Use a small symbolic-regression fit over white-box features to discover interaction terms.
raw_ideas.title: Symbolic-regression interaction fit

raw_ideas.summary: Collect NCU counter trends on calibration split and train a bottleneck classifier as a side output.
raw_ideas.title: NCU bottleneck classifier

raw_ideas.summary: Change primary metric from MAPE to log-MAE to reduce sensitivity to tiny-runtime configs.
raw_ideas.title: Log-MAE objective alternative

raw_ideas.summary: Build a synthetic kernel microbenchmark suite to calibrate B200 constants independently of FA4.
raw_ideas.title: Synthetic B200 microbenchmark suite

summary: Raw idea slate for the FlashAttention-4 B200 runtime model idea pass.
title: Raw Idea Slate: FlashAttention-4 B200 Runtime Model Idea Pass
